title: Founding Designer
_verificationNote: Verified live via YC job page (200, full job description, rawLength 2286). MediSearch (YC S23) — search engine for trustworthy medical information, direct answers to medical questions using LLMs. Founding Designer focused primarily on ad creative and growth design, with occasional core product design contribution. Based in Bratislava, Slovakia — requires 50% in-person minimum. 6-person team, founded 2023. €35K-€45K. Any experience level ok, new grads welcome. Posted ~1 day ago per YC board.
